stories.title: CompactifAI base compression
stories.description:
**CompactifAI base compression**

- Files to touch: `src/compress/compactifai.py`, `src/compress/__init__.py`, `scripts/compress_base.py`, `tests/test_compactifai.py`, `configs/compactifai.yaml`
- Implement tensor-network truncation over self-attn (Q/K/V/O projections) and MLP (gate/up/down) layers of Qwen3.5-4B BF16 checkpoint. Use `quimb` for MPS/MPO decomposition and `opt_einsum` for contraction paths.
- Expose CLI: `uv run python scripts/compress_base.py --bond-dim 32 --input models/qwen3.5-4b/bf16 --output models/qwen3.5-4b-compact/chi32`.
- Progressive chi schedule: produce chi in {64, 32, 16, 8} artifacts; evaluate each on HumanEval-sample + MMLU-Pro-sample.
- Acceptance: chi=32 artifact exists at `models/qwen3.5-4b-compact/chi32/`, on-disk size <= 1 GB, loader smoke test yields non-empty response, accuracy drop on HumanEval-sample < 5 pp vs BF16 baseline.
- Dependencies: v0.1 story-1 (BF16 base downloaded).

stories.title: QTHA adapter for stack-02 (reasoning)
stories.description:
**QTHA adapter for stack-02 (reasoning)**

- Files to touch: `src/stacks/qtha.py`, `src/stacks/__init__.py`, `scripts/train_qtha_stack.py`, `tests/test_qtha.py`, `configs/qtha-stack-02.yaml`
- Implement `QTHAAdapter(nn.Module)`: decomposes frozen base weights into tensor-network factor + trainable low-bond-dim correction. Param count target ~500 K vs 2 M MoLoRA rank-16. PEFT-style attach/detach.
- Train on v0.1 stack-02 reasoning dataset on RTX 4090 via Unsloth-compatible path.
- Acceptance: adapter at `outputs/stacks/stack-02-reasoning-qtha/`, param count <= 600 K, win_rate_vs_base >= v0.1 MoLoRA stack-02 - 1 pp, report at `results/qtha-vs-molora.md`.
- Dependencies: story-v02-1 or v0.1 BF16 base.

stories.title: Tensor-network router prototype
stories.description:
**Tensor-network router prototype**

- Files to touch: `src/routing/tn_router.py`, `src/routing/__init__.py`, `scripts/train_tn_router.py`, `tests/test_tn_router.py`, `configs/tn-router.yaml`
- Implement `TNRouter(nn.Module)` gating via matrix product states (MPS) over embedding; per-domain scores via interference amplitudes.
- Train on v0.1 3-domain eval set (chat-fr + reasoning + python). Fallback guard: macro-F1 drop > 2 pp vs sigmoid -> do not merge into serving path.
- Acceptance: `outputs/routers/tn-v0/` artifact, report `results/tn-vs-sigmoid.md` with macro-F1 delta and decision line (merge | fallback).
- Dependencies: v0.1 3-domain router eval set (main branch).
